I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (2004-12-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan.  The plan sponsor will not make further contributions after my separation. (2004-12-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined benefit plan. (1993-07-01)
I will continue to participate in this defined contribution plan. (1986-09-01)

I will resign from my position with Blue Diamond Horizons, Inc., but will continue to own the company. I will not provide services material to the production of income to this entity or to any of its subsidiaries. Instead, I will receive only passive investment income from this entity and its subsidiaries. All amounts owed to me will be fixed before I assume the duties of the position. (2025-02-01)
My business will be inactive during my appointment.  No fees are owed to me, and I will cease any business activities for this entity during my time of government service. (2025-02-01)
